name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients on Sales Navigator only — no third-party outreach tool. Supports full-sequence campaigns (connect request + three-message post-accept conversation) and connect-only campaigns. Drives Sales Nav via Chrome MCP and keeps all state in a single workbook under /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day and 100/week connection cap. Every reply routes through rockstarr-reply for operator approval.
